titleStmt.title: SII 22.356: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 356. (A.R. No. 356 of 1906) TIRUCHIRAPALLI DISTRICT, PUDUKKOTTAI STATE, KUḌUMIYĀMALAI. ŚIKHĀNĀTHASVĀMI TEMPLE—ON THE SAME WALL. JAṬ. VĪRA-PĀṆḌYADĒVA—11th YEAR (A.D. 1263-64).

summary.p: This begins with introduction Tirumagaḷ vaḷar-mulai etc. It is left incomplete. It registers a royal order issued at the request of (Minister) Kāliṅgarāyar while the king was encamped at Karaiyūr in Kōnāḍu, making a gift of the village Mēlmaṇanallūr together with all its dues and taxes like kaḍamai, kaṟpūra-vilai etc, to the temple of Tirunalakkunram-uḍaiya-Nāyanār to meet the expenses of worship and other requirements of goddess Tirukkāmakkōṭṭa-Nāchchiyār who had been consecrated, it is said, by Nāchchiyār the daughter of Durggaiyāṇḍāḷ, evidently the same person mentioned in Nos. 352 and 353 above.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tirumakaḷ vaḷarmulai tirumārpu taḷaippa porumakaḷ vaḷar mulai puyampuṇarntu kaḷippa naṉmoḻi nāṉmicaic coṉmakaḷiruppa ticaikaḷeṭ ṭiṉum ceyama
kaḷ vaḷara Irumuṉṟu camaiyamum Orumuṉṟu tamiḻum vetanāṉkum nitiyil viḷaṅkak kaṅkaṅ kavuṭam kaṭāraṅ kācipam koṅkaṅ kutiraṅ kollama kutavam Arumaṉañ coṉakam ciṉa ma
vanti karunaṭa miḻaṅ kaliṅkan teliṅkam pepaṉan taṇakam paṇṭara mutalirampuli ventaru mikal maṇṭalikarum mummuraicu muḻaṅkum cemmaṇi māḷikai koyiṟ koṟṟa vāyiṟ pukuntu kālam
pārttu kaḻaliṇai paṇintu nalveḻamum netiyamum kāṭṭi pūviricolai kāvikaḷattu coḻaṉ poruta veḻapporil matappiṟṟāṟāka katakkaḷiyāṉai tuḷaikkac cempoṟṟoṭikkaiyiṟ
(ṟoṭikkaiyiṟ) piṭittu vaḷaittu melkoṇṭu vākaicūṭi talaip perāṇmai taṉitaṉi yeṭuttu talaikkavinaracar kaviṉpeṟattutippateṟṟamaṉṉar ttātatiyāmal Oṟṟaiyāḻiyulaku valamara E
ṉai maṉṉavar teṟkoṭiṟaiñca miṉavar koṭit teruvileṅka vacu varaik koṭuṅkol vaḻaṅkā vaṇmanantalai ceṅkol nāṭoṟu naṭappa Etticai maṉṉarum miruṅkali kaṭintu muttave
ṇkuṭai muḻunilavu coriya Orumoḻi tirappap puvanamuḻutum taṉ matamārpu viḷaṅka maṇimuṭi cūṭi Uraikeḻuppa pala Araiciyal vaḻakkam neṟippaṭa nāṭṭuṅ kuṟippiṉuḷḷicaintiruppa tañcelavattiru
nta mantiri caraṇmai tikaḻntiṉitu nokki muraṇmiku ciṟappil Īḻamu maṉṉar Ilakuvariloruvaṉai viḻa muṭporutu viṇmicaiyeṟṟi Urimaiccuṟṟamum Uyarkulam pukuta taṉmai yāṇmaiyum pala
paṭaippuraviyum kaṉamaṇitterum ciṉavaṭamarum kānakattorum navamaṇik kuvaiyum Āṭakattiriyum Ariācaṉamum muṭiyum kaṭakamum muḻumaṇiyāramum koṭiyuṅ kuṭaiyum kuḷirveṇkavariyum muracuñ caṅ
kamum taṉamu mutali Araicu keḻutāya maṭaiyavar kāṇā maṉnavar kaṇṭu kaṇṭeṅka koṇāmalaiyaṉum tirikūṭakiriyāṉum Urukeḻu koṭimicai Irukayaleḻuti Eṉai ventaṉai Āṉaitiṟaikoṇṭu
paṇṭeval ceyyātikal ceytirunta cāvaṉmaintaṉ nala mikun tiṟaiñca virakkaḻal liruvaraic caṭṭat tirukkoḷam Alaivarap paṭaṉ kaḻittu vaḻaṅki Aruḷi muḻaṅku kaḷiṟeṟi pārmuḻutaṟiya Ūrva
lañcey vittu nantai Āṇṭa taṭaṅkaṭaliḻam maintaṉ peṭikku marapeṉa niṉaippiṭṭaraiciṭa makiḻntu Āṉūr Aḷiccuviraiyaccelkeṉṟurai kuṭuttaruḷi yākamaṭantai Aṉpuṭaṉ cātti vākai cūṭi ma
tumaṇaṅ kamaḻ malarnta veṇkavariṉ vāṭalun teṉṟalum ventarvica viraciṅkātaṉattu kaṟpanantaḻuviya kāmarval�
ta poṟṟoṭi puṉaintu malarnta malarkkoḻum paripuraic ciṟṟaṭi Ulakamuḻutumuṭaiyāroṭum viṟṟiruntaruḷiya svastiśrī ko
ccaṭaipaṉmarāṉa tiripuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ ciri virapāṇṭiya tevaṟku yāṇṭu 10 1vatu ḷ 100 3- ṉāl koṉāṭṭukkāraiyūril Eḻuntaruḷi Irukka Iṉṉāṭṭut tirunalakkuṉṟattu Uṭaiyār tirunalakkuṉ
ṟamuṭaiya nāyaṉār koyil tāṉattār kaṇṭu Ikkoyiṟ tirumeṟṟaḷi yuṭaiya makātevaṟku Ivūrt tevaraṭiyāril tukkaiyāṇṭiṭāḷ makaḷ nācci Eḻuntaruḷivitta tirukkāmakkoṭṭattu nācciyār Uruvu
ṭaimulai m(ā)ṅkaiyārkkup pūcaikkum tiruppaṇikkum veṇṭum nimantaṅ kaḷukkum Uṭalāka Iṉnāṭṭu melmaṇanallūr nāṉkellai Uḷḷakappaṭṭa kuḷamum kuḷapparippum nattamum nattappāḻum
naṉcey puṉcey toṭṭamum Uṭpaṭṭa nilattil Ivvūr tiruvikkirama coḷiśvaramuṭaiya nāyaṉārkku kuṭikkāṭu Akavayal Uṭpaṭa nilam Araiyum tirunalakkuṉṟamuṭaiya nāyaṉār koyil nāṟpatteṇṇāyi
ravaṉ tirumaṭattukku maṭappuṟam nilam Araiyum Āka nilam veli nikki nilattil paḻantevatāṉam nikki nikki Uḷḷa nilattuk kaṭamai kaṟpūravilaik kāriyavā rāṭci pañcupili cantu vigrahappeṟu taṟiiṟai ta
ṭṭārppāṭṭam Iṉavari Īḻampuñcey cekkiṟai poṉvari Ilāñciṉaip peṟu Antarāyam Ataraviṉiyokam Accuvari veṭṭippāṭṭam Iṭaivari maṟṟum Epperpaṭṭaṉavum Uṭpaṭap patiṉoṉṟāvatu
mutal tevatāṉa Iṟaiyiliāka Iṭappeṟaveṇumeṉṟu kāliṅkarāyar namakkuc coṉṉamaiyil Ittirunalakkuṉṟamuṭaiya nāyaṉār koyil tirumelttaḷi yuṭaiya makātevarkku Ivvūr ṣtops here Incomplete
Digital edition of SII 22.356 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
